Log In
Download for Mac
Group chat that’s all fun & games
Discord is great for playing games and chilling with friends, or even building a worldwide community. Customize your own space to talk, play, and hang out.
Download for Mac
Open Discord in your browser
find your friends on discord.
Download
MAKE YOUR GROUP CHATS MORE FUN
Use custom emoji, stickers, soundboard effects and more to add your personality to your voice, video, or text chat. Set your avatar and a custom status, and write your own profile to show up in chat your way.
stream like you’re in the same room
High quality and low latency streaming makes it feel like you're hanging out on the couch with friends while playing a game, watching shows, looking at photos, or idk doing homework or something.
Hop in when you're free, no need to call
Easily hop in and out of voice or text chats without having to call or invite anyone, so your party chat lasts before, during, and after your game session.
talk
play
chat
hang out
talk
play
chat
hang out
talk
play
chat
hang out
talk
play
chat
hang out
See who's around to chill
See who's around, playing games, or just hanging out. For supported games, you can see what modes or characters your friends are playing and directly join up.
always have something to do together
Watch videos, play built-in games, listen to music, or just scroll together and spam memes. Seamlessly text, call, video chat, and play games, all in one group chat.
wherever YOU GAME, HANG OUT HERE
On your PC, phone, or console, you can still hang out on Discord. Easily switch between devices and use tools to manage multiple group chats with friends.
YOU CAN'T SCROLL
ANYMORE.
BETTER GO CHAT.
Download for Mac

Tired of living the default life? We get it. Subscribe to Nitro, and unlock the supercharged side of Discord.

WHAT’S NEW

Terms and eligibility rules apply.
Save on Gear
Build your dream setup with exclusive discount codes every month. Only with Nitro.
Unlock More Orbs
Grow your stash with monthly Orb drops and a 1.2x multiplier on Quest rewards.
EXPLORE THE
BEST OF NITRO
TURN HEADS IN EVERY CHAT
Take your look to the next level with animated avatars, banner images, profile themes, and more!
Make this place your space

HYPE AND MEME WITH BETTER EMOJIS

LIVE LIFE WITHOUT LIMITS

Features
NITRO
BASIC

Subscribe

Terms and eligibility rules apply.

Join up to 200 servers
POPULAR
NITRO
-
$9.99/month
Subscribe
Questions?
Questions about Nitro? Check out our FAQ.
View All Questions
General
Payments
Gifting and Promotions
Other
What’s Nitro?
Nitro is a membership that unlocks features and perks across Discord and beyond, giving you more ways to have fun, express yourself, and get more from the games you play.
Does Discord Nitro include Xbox Game Pass?
Yes. Nitro members get access to Xbox Game Pass (Starter Edition), which includes a library of 50+ games across PC and console, plus 10 hours of cloud gaming every month. It’s included with your Nitro membership at no additional cost. Availability varies by region. Visit your Nitro Home to get started.
What are Nitro Rewards?
Nitro Rewards is a benefits program included with your Nitro membership that gives you access to gaming services, gear discounts, and perks from partners like Xbox, Logitech, and SteelSeries. We're always exploring new partners and aim to bring you more of what you love as this program evolves.
How does Nitro work?
When you subscribe to Nitro, you get access to features that were previously locked for you - like using custom emoji anywhere, uploading bigger files, setting a custom video background, and more. When the subscription ends, you’ll lose access to the perks.
What’s the difference between Nitro and Nitro Basic?
Nitro is our most popular plan that unlocks access to all available Nitro perks, and Nitro Basic includes a selection of the most-loved Nitro perks that help you better express yourself. See the comparison chart above for a full breakdown!
How much does Nitro cost?
Cost varies depending on your country and plan. You can check Nitro prices under User Settings > Nitro in either the desktop or mobile apps.
Where can I buy Nitro?
You can purchase Nitro by visiting the Nitro tab in User Settings, or in the Nitro page under Home on desktop. On mobile, visit User Settings by tapping your user icon in the bottom bar, then select Get Nitro.
What payment methods do you accept?
We accept a variety of payment methods, which you can learn more info on
here
!
Do you offer Nitro and Nitro Basic in localized pricing?
We are constantly working to expand the availability of localized pricing for Nitro and Nitro Basic. Check
this article
for information on where localized pricing is currently available.
Are Nitro gifts real?
Yes! You can purchase a Nitro gift through the Nitro page on desktop or the Nitro Gifting tab within mobile under User Settings. Additionally, you can send a quick gift in a channel by selecting the gift icon on desktop or mobile. If someone sends you a gift, you can see what it looks like
here
. You can also buy Discord Nitro directly on
Amazon.com
(in select regions).
How can I buy a Discord Nitro gift card on Amazon.com?
Nitro gift cards on Amazon are a great way to gift Nitro to a friend, or have someone gift Nitro to you. Just click
this link
for a variety of Discord gift options, from 1 to 12-month Nitro subscriptions. Learn more about Discord gift cards on Amazon in this
Help Center article
.
Where to redeem Nitro codes?
You can redeem your Nitro code on the desktop and web apps through the Gift Inventory page in User Settings.
Can I get free Nitro from a bot or a giveaway?
The only official way to receive Nitro is through a
gift
sent to you in chat, or by receiving a code that can be redeemed under Gift Inventory in User Settings on the desktop and web apps. We strongly encourage not clicking on any links from people you don’t know well. For more tips on staying safe on Discord, visit our
Safety
page.
Does Discord offer Nitro Promotions?
We are always working on ways to give you more with Nitro! Keep an eye out in the app, on our
Twitter
,
Instagram
, or
blog
to see when new promotions go live. :)
My Nitro subscription comes with Boosts. What are those?
Server Boosts are a way to show support for your favorite communities. Each Boost that you give to a server helps collectively unlock perks for everyone in the server to enjoy. Learn more about Server Boosting
here
!
Are Boosts permanent?
A Nitro subscription only comes with 2 Boosts that you can share to any server you belong to. The Boosts do not stack over time, and they are not permanent. You’ll get to keep the Boosts for as long as your Nitro subscription is active.
Why is my Nitro not working?
If you’re having any trouble with your subscription, or have any questions, you can
reach out
to our team and we’ll be happy to help!
WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR?
Subscribe

Welcome
Discord Developer Platform
Copy page
Build bots and integrations on Discord, or connect your game with rich presence, voice chat, and more.
Copy page
Documentation Index
Fetch the complete documentation index at:
https://docs.discord.com/llms.txt
Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further.
​
What do you want to build?
Bots & Apps
Build automated apps, commands, and integrations that run inside Discord servers.
Activities
Create multiplayer games and social experiences that launch directly inside Discord.
Social Layer for Games
Add rich presence, voice chat, and social features to your game across all platforms.
​
New to Discord development?
Overview of Apps
Understand what Discord apps are, the different types, and how to get started.
Build Your First App
Follow a step-by-step guide to build and run your first Discord bot.
​
Resources
Join the Developer Discord
Get support, API announcements, and participate in developer events.
Report Issues on GitHub
Report issues with the Discord API and SDKs.
Visit the Developer Help Center
Find articles, FAQs, and reach out to Discord’s developer support team.
Was this page helpful?
Yes
No

integrations.title: Discord
integrations.text:
Discord
Join Discord to play games, explore apps, and hangout!
Create Account
Login
Featured
Games
Entertainment
Moderation and Tools
Social
Utilities
More
Featured
Games
Entertainment
Moderation and Tools
Social
Utilities
Find things to
do together
Bring the fun to your hangouts with apps for games, music, creative tools, and more.
Promoted Games
Wordle
Games
Enjoy Wordle from New York Times Games! You have 6 chances to guess a 5-letter word. When you make a guess, the color of the tiles will change to show how close you are to the winning word.
Magic Garden
Games
Grow your own unique and MAGICAL garden! Collect rare pets, giant flowers, and complete your Garden Journal. Play solo or with your friends — and your plants keep growing while you're offline!
Farm Merge Valley
Games
Farm, merge, grow and expand your land!

Welcome to the world of farming that gets bigger and better with each discovery. Come play this part merge, part world-building puzzle game. Farm Merge Valley
Watch Together
Utilities
Create and watch a playlist of YouTube videos with your friends. Your choice to share the remote or not.
Puzzle Games
Daily Word Wheel
Games
From the makers of Words with Friends, enjoy a daily word puzzle where you connect letters on the Word Wheel to crack the crossword.
Daily Sudoku Together
Games
Join Daily Sudoku Together on Discord! Solve unlimited puzzles, tackle 14 difficulty levels, explore variants like Killer & Chaos Sudoku, and connect with a vibrant community of puzzle lovers today!
Hex Puzzle Adventure
Games
A hex stacking puzzle game. Use strategic thinking to solve the levels and explore the adventure map.
Letter League
Social
In this turn-based word game, use letter tiles to form a word that connects to a word on the board. Each letter is worth points, and some squares earn double or triple points. Let your lexicon fly!
Card Games
Poker Night
Games
A Texas hold 'em style card game to prove your Poker prowess! Enjoy stickers, emotes, and more. In Showdown mode compete with your server for top spot on the leaderboard and earn the quarterly crown!
Blazing 8s
Games
Be the first to zero cards by swapping hands, skipping players, and reversing turns in this Crazy Eights inspired card game!
Blackjack
Games
The first visual Blackjack game on Discord. Play blackjack with friends. Bet chips, draw cards without passing 21, and collect your winnings! Quick rounds, daily rewards, and big wins await!
ERTH Poker
Games
ERTH Poker is the ultimate party poker game on Discord. Play with friends in Texas Hold’em or other popular poker modes. Host games, compete and climb the leaderboard, and meet our crew of AI dealers!
Strategy and Tabletop Games
Roll20
Games
Play tabletop role-playing games (TTRPGs) like Dungeons & Dragons (including D&D 2024 and 2014 editions) and more, all without leaving Discord.
Chess In The Park
Games
Unleash your inner Grandmaster by playing multiple games of Chess at once vs anybody on your server.
BattleTabs
Games
Viking Ship Battles! BattleTabs is a turn-based PVP strategy game full of nautical nonsense! Effortlessly easy to play but only the best will be able to master the strategies! Battle Your Friends!
Hideout
Social
Multiplayer cozy world with pets, homes, gardens are more! Build your apartment, grow a garden, visit friends, dress your avatar, make money and explore the many worlds, people and stories in Hideout.
Chill Together
Watch Together
Utilities
Create and watch a playlist of YouTube videos with your friends. Your choice to share the remote or not.
Lofi
Vibe with your friends with lofi music and a curated ambience.
Whiteboard
Social
In this collaborative whiteboard you can draw, upload images, write, and use GIFs. Boards are saved, so come back any time. It’s not just what you create, it’s the fun of creating it together!
Rythm
Promoted
Listen to music together with your friends anywhere on Discord.
Social Activities
Codenames Online
Games
Codenames is a team word game where players give clues to help teammates guess words on a grid. Find your words first—and avoid the assassin! The award-winning game is now playable on Discord!
The Last Show
Games
Available in 8+ languages. From the Makers of Death by AI! A Twisted party game show driven by AI overlords. Your survival means answering ridiculous questions and voting your friends out.
Banana of Doom
Games
Craft and battle cards in rapid mini-tournaments! ‘Robot Grandma’ vs ‘Moist Goblin’, which is more likely to end the world? AI decides! Expand your collection and add to your binder. A hilarious fast-
Death by AI
Games
Death by AI is a prompt based survival party game for up to 10 players.
Merge and Sim Games
MergeVille
Games
How long has it been since you've been a Mayor?
It's time to take charge of your entire City!

Expand your Farm, make goods, build, decorate your City. And that’s just the beginning!
Mergest Kingdom
Games
Join the Mergest Kingdom Discord! Connect with players, share tips, and stay updated on the latest events and news. Whether you're new or experienced, let's build, merge, and enjoy the game together!
Solitaire Home Story
Social
Relax with a charming solitaire game full of twists! Clear cards, decorate cozy rooms, and unfold a heartfelt story one chapter at a time.
Bobble League
Games
In this arcade-style soccer game use Power Plays and formations to bounce the ball into the goal, leading your team to victory! Try cross-server matchmaking to find more players to play with!
Action Games
Poxel.io
Games
Poxel.io is an online 3D action FPS game. Play Poxel.io with your friends and dominate the arena! There are over 30 maps to play on, 25 weapons to pick from, and over 1,500 skins to unlock on Poxel.io
Smash Karts
Games
Smash Karts is a MOKBA (Multiplayer Online Kart Battle Arena) game. Drive fast. Fire rockets. Make big explosions.
Krunker Strike FRVR
Games
Krunker Strike is a casual version of the popular shooter Krunker.io.
Kour.io
Games
Kour.io is a multiplayer IO FPS game that plunges you into intense battles across various maps with many guns and modes to play! It's one of the most accessible first-person shooters, available on bot
Bot Games
OwO
Social
OwO What's this? Hunt and battle your animals to the top of the leaderboards!
Dank Memer
Games
Meet the largest in-app indie game on Discord. A global currency and fishing game for catching creatures, collecting items, robbing your friends, taking care of pets, building skill trees, and more!
EPIC RPG
Games
A RPG game! Start playing with "rpg start" or "/start"!
VirtualFisher
Games
Virtual Fisher is a game you can play in your server focused on fishing: collect fish, sell them to buy upgrades, compete with your friends, and more!
Have Questions?
Visit our help center to learn more about using and discovering apps on Discord.
Learn More
,
,
Reactions

analysis.name: Discord
analysis.tagline: Group Chat That's All Fun & Games
analysis.value_proposition: A gaming-first voice, video, and text platform with persistent channels, built-in activities, and a developer SDK for embedding social features into games.
analysis.ideal_customer: Gamers and friend groups wanting always-on voice and social spaces; game developers integrating social layers into their titles

features.name: text chat
features.description: Channel-based and direct text messaging across servers and DMs
features.evidence_quote: Easily hop in and out of voice or text chats without having to call or invite anyone

features.name: voice chat
features.description: Low-latency persistent voice channels users drop into freely
features.evidence_quote: High quality and low latency streaming makes it feel like you're hanging out on the couch

features.name: video chat
features.description: Video calling in channels or DMs
features.evidence_quote: Seamlessly text, call, video chat, and play games, all in one group chat

features.name: screen sharing
features.description: Share screen or stream games and content to friends in voice channels
features.evidence_quote: stream like you're in the same room — watching shows, looking at photos, or doing homework

features.name: hd video streaming
features.description: Higher-quality HD streams, unlocked with Nitro subscription

features.name: custom emoji
features.description: Upload and use custom emoji; Nitro unlocks use across all servers

features.name: animated emoji
features.description: Animated custom emoji, requires Nitro

features.name: stickers
features.description: Send stickers in chat; Nitro unlocks custom stickers anywhere and 300+ exclusive stickers
features.evidence_quote: Custom stickers anywhere, plus 300+ Nitro exclusive stickers

features.name: soundboard
features.description: Play sound effects in voice channels; Nitro unlocks custom sounds across all servers
features.evidence_quote: Use custom emoji, stickers, soundboard effects and more to add your personality

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Upload and share files; limit scales by tier (free implied <50MB, Basic: 50MB, Nitro: 500MB)

features.name: custom avatar
features.description: Set a personalized profile picture; Nitro unlocks animated avatars
features.evidence_quote: Set your avatar and a custom status, and write your own profile

features.name: animated avatar
features.description: Animated GIF profile picture, requires Nitro
features.evidence_quote: Take your look to the next level with animated avatars, banner images, profile themes

features.name: profile banner
features.description: Custom banner image displayed on profile, requires Nitro
features.evidence_quote: animated avatars, banner images, profile themes, and more

features.name: profile themes
features.description: Custom visual theme applied to profile page, requires Nitro

integrations: New York Times Games (Wordle, Daily Word Wheel)
differentiators: Activities: games and social apps run natively inside Discord voice channels without leaving the app
Social SDK for game developers: embed Discord voice, rich presence, and friends list in any title
Persistent voice channels — hop in/out without scheduling or initiating a call
Xbox Game Pass Starter Edition bundled with Nitro at no extra cost
Cross-platform console, PC, and mobile with seamless handoff
Game detection and rich presence surfacing real-time character/mode data to friends

recent_ships.what: Xbox Game Pass (Starter Edition) bundled into Nitro — 50+ games and 10h cloud gaming/month
recent_ships.source: NITRO NOW INCLUDES XBOX GAME PASS — pricing page banner

recent_ships.what: Orbs rewards system with monthly Nitro drops and 1.2x Quest multiplier
recent_ships.source: Grow your stash with monthly Orb drops and a 1.2x multiplier on Quest rewards — pricing page

recent_ships.what: Age verification via face scan or government ID required for full platform access
recent_ships.source: Discord will require a face scan or ID for full access next month — HN (2046↑)

recent_ships.what: Backend infrastructure migration from Go to Rust for performance and memory improvements
recent_ships.source: Why Discord is switching from Go to Rust — HN (1582↑)

praised: Frictionless voice UX: drop into channels without scheduling or calling anyone
Gaming integrations: rich presence, game detection, and Activities are highly valued
Low-latency voice quality consistently cited as best-in-class for gaming
complaints: Privacy/surveillance concerns: 'Discord will require a face scan or ID for full access next month' (2046↑)

Poor fit for developer support communities vs. searchable forums: 'Please stop closing forums and moving people to Discord' (996↑), 'Use forums rather than Slack/Discord to support developer community' (1631↑)
Security vulnerabilities: '0-click deanonymization attack targeting Signal, Discord, other platforms' (1457↑)
Supply-chain attack surface: 'We pwned X, Vercel, Cursor, and Discord through a supply-chain attack' (1167↑)
Perceived inconsistent moderation: 'Discord bans r/WallStreetBets server' (1056↑)

free_tier.limits: file uploads <50MB, standard emoji only, message limit 2000 chars, server join limit <200

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Text, voice, video; standard emoji; basic file sharing; server creation and management

tiers.name: Nitro Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom emoji anywhere, 50MB uploads, custom app icons

tiers.name: Nitro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Basic + Xbox Game Pass, 500MB uploads, HD streaming, custom profiles, 2 boosts, themes

pricing.notes: Pricing varies by region; Xbox Game Pass availability is region-limited. Server Boosts are separate purchases; Nitro includes 2 free boosts + 30% off additional. Yearly billing option likely exists in-app but not shown in source. No enterprise tier exists — Discord is consumer/developer-only.
